description: SEMrush Analytics API integration for SMMFactory — SEO + PPC competitive intelligence (Research phase). The search-side twin of adspyder_config.json.

reports.domain_overview: domain_ranks — rank, organic/paid traffic, keyword counts
reports.organic_keywords: domain_organic — keywords the domain ranks for organically
reports.paid_keywords: domain_adwords — competitor Google Ads keywords + copy
reports.organic_competitors: domain_organic_organic — domains competing for the same keywords
reports.keyword_overview: phrase_this — volume, CPC, competition, difficulty per tracked keyword

pipeline.step_1: SEMrush pulls domain overview + organic/paid keywords + organic competitors
pipeline.step_2: Keyword overview run per tracked keyword for gap discovery
pipeline.step_4: Feed to scripts/ai-intelligence-analyst.mjs for gap analysis + proof-based ad copy
pipeline.step_5: Feed high-intent keyword gaps to OpenClaw for Google Ads keyword build

api.units_note: Consumes API units — requires the SEMrush API-units add-on. Tracked-keyword overview is capped to 10/run to protect units.
